name: Double Corn Tortilla Cassarole
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 2 quart square baking dish.
2. Tear the tortillas into bite-sized pieces.
3. Arrange half of the torn tortillas in the baking dish.
4. Top with half of the cheese, half of the corn, and half of the green onions.
5. Repeat layering with the remaining ingredients.
6. Stir together the eggs, buttermilk, and chili peppers.
7. Gently pour over the tortilla mixture.
8. Bake, uncovered, in a 325 degree oven for about 30 minutes, or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
9. Serve warm.
Makes 4 servings.
